args: export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN="$(grep -E '^GITHUB_TOKEN=' "/home/work/Documentos/Github/kafka-project/.env" | head -1 | cut -d= -f2- | tr -d '\r')"; exec docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN -e GITHUB_TOOLSETS=issues,pull_requests,repos ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server:v1.5.0
